programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A spectacular adventure that pits Godzilla against malevolent creatures that threaten the very existence of humans.

programme.title: Footloose

programme.title: Footloose

programme.title: Women's Super League 2025/26 E80 -London City Lionesses vs Chelsea
Beijing Rocks
programme.desc: Yang Yin, a starry-eyed dance girl in search of love; Ping Lu, an impetuous Beijing Rock and Roll singer in search of recognition; and Michael, a Hong Kong-born and overseas-educated composer in search of himself. Three people from different walks of life are...

programme.title: Never Stop
programme.desc: Tianyi Wu, a young 100-meter-running champion, returns to his hometown, aiming to get off his chest the failure to surpass his former teammate, Chaoyue Hao. But he doesn't expect to see that Chaoyue's life is in shambles as well. They retreat to the memories of their lives, both shared and separate, in an attempt to lift each other up from their current situation.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: Heat and Energy
programme.desc: What's the difference between convection and conduction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of energy. Have hands-on fun by heating up a water balloon, and get to know James Prescott Joule, a physicist, who discovered the mechanical force of heat.

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Bread Rolls
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula make delicious bread rolls with sugar, eggs, baking yeast, flour, olive oil, milk, salt, lemon shavings, and orange shavings.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Philly love: Rowing at Boathouse Row, history walk at Independence Hall, mural art with the Mural Arts Program, and pretzel twisting at Philadelphia Pretzel Factory. A week of cultural immersion with Nicole and local teens!

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Utah adventure: White water rafting near Salt Lake City, bobsled racing at Utah Olympic Park, fearless rappelling in Moab, and off-the-grid dinosaur excavation. A week of thrilling escapades with Nicole and local teens in the great state of Utah!

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Ships
programme.desc: The icebreaker loses its crew, and Kit and his curious crew must jump in and bring the ship safely to the port.

programme.title: Boy Band
programme.desc: Naomi wins a webcam chat with hearthrob JB from chart-topping pop combo Boydance. When the time comes to talk Naomi is tongue-tied and Carol steals her thunder, which threatens the girls' friendship.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Pygmy Shrew
programme.desc: Grey Squirrel wonders what it would be like to be a teeny tiny shrew, leaving Red no choice but to play along. Fleabag and Plop fall in love with the adorable baby shrews. And Flip, Flop, and Flow try to convince their parents to let them get a pet shrew.

programme.title: Second Annual Student Astronaut Contest
programme.desc: High school and college students compete for a fantastic prize: Going aboard a Zero-G aircraft where they'll experience microgravity with host, Emily Calandrelli. We'll see the student-winner try to execute a scientific experiment in weightlessness.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Snot-tacular!
programme.desc: A world champion whistler pops in to help the doctors whistle – and even Billy Bones joins in! And the Cupboard of Everything is on the move again through time, landing in an operating theatre where you wouldn't want to be a patient.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: West Coast - Heading For Bird Island
programme.desc: Trying to find a shortcut to Bird Island, the youngsters end up stuck in a desolate dune field. Night falls and they encounter creatures that both scare and enthral them. They find a path to the coast and must cross a mighty river with the help of local fishermen.

programme.title: Lambert's Bay Bird Island - Where The Birds Are In Charge
programme.desc: The team travels a barren coastline to find Bird Island. They discover how the sandy beach is used by some highly adapted creatures and learn about the most dangerous animal on the planet. They explore the rocky shore and get to taste some very unusual seafood.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: Heat and Energy
programme.desc: What's the difference between convection and conduction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of energy. Have hands-on fun by heating up a water balloon, and get to know James Prescott Joule, a physicist, who discovered the mechanical force of heat.

programme.title: No Foolin' Fico
programme.desc: Fico loves practical jokes. When his friend Gotcha Garcia invites them to a tomato-throwing festival, they're skeptical. Is La Tomatina a real festival? Curious, they set off to Bunol, Spain. The festival proves to be real, but Anabella won't give the tomatoes back.

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Hero's School
programme.desc: It's hard to be the only superhero, and in an attempt to share the responsibilities, Sprinter starts a school to train more heroes. However, when the villains suddenly show up on the field, the students have to take a very early exam.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Pilou and the Scooter Chase
programme.desc: It's Pilou's birthday, and the Buffycats surprise her with a kick scooter! Pilou is super happy, and her dog friend Terry helps her learn how to ride it. But the cat catchers trap the Buffycats! Will Pilou manage to save her furry fellows?

programme.title: Terminal Velocity
programme.desc: With their textbook back in hand, the group returns to their main mission of finding the secret lab – only to be stumped by the latest riddle. Joy proposes a solution that reveals a shocking secret from Raign's past.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Quebec
programme.desc: Quebec winter thrill: Dogsledding, ice sculpting, hockey lesson with local teens, and extreme sledding at Village Vacances Valcartier. A week of icy adventures with Nicole in Canada!

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Lava Lamp
programme.desc: You'll lava this one. We'll show you how to use a bottle and oil in this make that bubbles and boils.

programme.title: Taking Flight
programme.desc: Philippe visits the Congaree National Park in South Carolina where he catches and tags local bats. Later, he studies the flight patterns of wood storks and examines the magical transition from caterpillar to butterfly.

programme.title: Melissa Millett: Amazing Pets
programme.desc: Melissa trained her dog and cat to become a record-breaking duo. She shares with Alan Pixsley the fundamentals of animal training and what it takes to become the very best. But what will be the one thing that Alan can learn from Melissa and his new furry friends?

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Health Check-ups
programme.desc: Jamie and Nyatepe are helping vet Scott examine poorly dog Isla. Josh and Molly visit a newborn donkey. And alpacas are keeping Robyn and Bonte on their toes.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it’ll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: E115 - Cover Girls / Save the Date
programme.desc: When all 10 of Lincoln’s sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby’s little sister, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: E107 - #ToddlerClimbing
programme.desc: A competing babysitting service is posting fake, bad reviews about Sam and Cat's babysitting service. Sam and Cat confront their new competition and discover they're not what they appear to be.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E209 - Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers

Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: E7 - The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hollywood star Marina Gregg moves to St Mary Mead and throws a benefit event. When a local admirer dies from a poisoned drink, Miss Marple and the police suspect the poison was meant for someone else and investigate who the intended target was.

programme.title: E9 - Perverted
programme.desc: While in the park, a family stumbles upon the sexually mutilated body of Clyde Vandyne, a member of a biker gang known for prostitution and contract killing.

programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.desc: The Walton household is upset when John-Boy brings home a teenage college-student genius with a photographic memory.

programme.title: E18 - B. Pets Not Welcome/Cruisin' for a Bruisin/Road Trippin/Magic Mirror/Bone Dry
programme.desc: When Rick and Ginger sneak Tom and Spike into a hotel where pets are not allowed, they make the pets promise not to leave the hotel room. Will the pets behave?

programme.title: E57 - Freedom Cactus/Escape from Beyond the Cosmic
programme.desc: Clarence draws a comic for the school paper and it becomes a huge hit with the kids. When angry parents step in and censor the comic's 'crass' humour, Clarence must stand up for his artistic vision.

programme.title: E274 - Bonnibel Bubblegum/Seventeen/Marcy & Hunson/The First Investigation/Blenanas
programme.desc: A long-lost artifact causes Princess Bubblegum to harken back to the creation of the Candy Kingdom.

programme.title: E6 - A. Hey Pizza!/Gorilla/Girl's Night Out/You're Fired/Super Robin
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg try their best to slow the pizza delivery boy so they can get free pizza.

programme.title: E140 - Wanted/Gadget Kid/The Visitor/The Big Tv/Keyboard Capers
programme.desc: Mistaken for an escaped convict, Bean is carted off to jail where he finds that, with a little imagination, prison can be quite nice actually. The real convict finds life less cosy under the thumb of Mr. Bean’s landlady.

programme.title: E133 - Telephone Pole Gags 2: Shrinking Telephone Pole / In The Road Again!/Happy Birdy To Y
programme.desc: Tweety spies a puddy from his perch.

programme.title: E16 - A Scary Screw-Up
programme.desc: Amato and Pian try to rehabilitate the bad robots but an accident gives the bad robot Scarescrew a chance to escape.

programme.title: E40 - On the Run/Horror Club/Maximum Capacity
programme.desc: Steven and Amethyst try out life on the road.

programme.title: E10 - Cold Weather Creatures
programme.desc: Life in freezing conditions takes skill! See how Arctic Foxes, Seals, Penguins, Moose, and Sea Otters adapt and thrive in the harshest cold environments on Earth!

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Whilst humans are prone to fighting the inevitability of ageing, trees have perfected the art of aging gracefully. In this episode, we will discover how mature trees do incredible things to thrive in an often turbulent world, and may even work together to do so.

programme.title: E2 - Xinjiang - The Taklamakan Desert
programme.desc: Hundreds of years ago one of the major challenges to traders along the Silk Road was the deadly Taklamakan Desert. Join Ryan has he takes a journey deep in to the remote desert, where endless waves of sand stretch far in to the horizon in every direction.

programme.desc: The 83,000-strong Vietnamese community in the Czech Republic represents the third largest ethnic-minority in the country.

programme.desc: Gatka is a traditional martial art associated with the Sikhs of Punjab, emphasizing weapon-based combat, particularly stick-fighting.

programme.desc: The presence of Malays in Sri Lanka dates back to the 13th century, but it was not until the late 19th century that the population grew.

programme.desc: Shark filmmakers Andy Casagrande and Jeff Kurr seek the second breaching great white to uncover secrets that make history in New Zealand's waters.

programme.desc: A couple try to build a geodesic dome with a view of the Southern Cumberland Mountain Range. But they face uncertain weather and treacherous mountain paths.

programme.title: SW25: Surviving Jaws

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E5 - Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready to make, play & learn with JJ! First, find out what JJ's favorite pizza toppings are as you sing along to this yummy adventure. Then, Dad shows JJ how to make a healthy & delicious snack: fresh fruit ice cream! The hands-on fun continues as TomTom shows JJ how to be a 'toy mechanic' & fix his favorite toy school bus when a wheel pops off. From learning about veggies to becoming 'Clean Machines,' it's a day of creative fun!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. programme.title: E9 - Sheila LaBarre: Sheila The Peeler
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: E17 - Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Ten years after a young mother allegedly abandoned her family, her mother-in-law reveals a shocking secret: she believes both of her daughter-in-law's lovers murdered her.

programme.title: E5 - A World Of Hurt
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E18 - Let's Play At Having Ideas
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: E9 - Aiming For The Moon
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E3 -Eddie Or Not...
programme.desc: Cousin Eddie visits Rodney to make amends for years of being a jerk.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E4 -Trouble Date
programme.desc: Rodney invites Darlene over for a date.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E7 -Frag The Dog
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney launch Mr. J's prized bowling trophy into the neighbor's yard.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E12 -Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: Ai: Where It's Risky - And Where It's A Game-Changer

programme.title: Special Samurai Drama 'Nemuri Kyoshiro'
programme.desc: The blue-eyed ronin Nemuri Kyoshiro (Hasegawa Hiroki) is hired by Takebe Senjuro (Takuma Shin), an aide to Mizuno Tadakuni, to eliminate spies targeting Tadakuni. While investigating them, he encounters the sister of one of the spies, a secret Christian named Kayaba Shizuka (Kuroshima Yuina). However, fearing exposure, her group's leader Bizenya (Jinbo Satoshi) orders Kyoshiro's death. At the same time, Senior Inspector Matsudaira Mondonosho (Bando Yajuro) also orders his retainer to kill him.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E9 - Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: Wardens follow a bear of a case. Then the comical story of a decoy deer gone wrong.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E6 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: E3 - The Payoff
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E4 - Secrets From The Skies
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world's most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies... Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: E7 - The Sunken Legend
programme.desc: A powerful hurricane forces Jeff's team into a secluded cove, where they investigate The Lombrac, a legendary 18th-century ghost ship. The divers recover intriguing clues from the murky depths.

programme.title: E11 - In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When the team performs a hi-tech experiment at the Triangle, it leads to a stunning revelation that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: E9 - Super Snakes
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle battle a hyper aggressive breed of python. Bill and Tes try to stay one step ahead of the Army Corp of Engineers. Dusty works on a plan to get the snakes to come to him.

programme.title: E129 - Mehndi Wala Ghar
programme.desc: This is a story of the coming together of a disintegrated joint family in Ujjain that once lived by their motto, 'A family that eats together, prays together, stays together!'

programme.title: E11 - Spice Up- Cooking Show
programme.desc: Whether it's friends over for dinner or the traditional motherly food. Each episode Poonam will make the tastiest dishes for every scenario.

programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E4 - Ceylon Tea Trails, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Monica and Rob travel to the highlands of central Sri Lanka to learn about Ceylon Tea Trails - a series of colonial era bungalows that have been renovated and revisioned by a local family of tea entrepreneurs. Monica works with the tea pickers and learns the importance of the industry to the country, while Rob tracks leopards in the surrounding plantations.

Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.desc: Military experts analysis the latest global military situation.

E18
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E112
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family, one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice - helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E18

programme.title: E7 - 武夷山開山谷演唱會
programme.desc: 世界遺產探訪紀實文化類節目，由單霽翔、周韻、肖央、牛駿峰擔任「世遺守護人」，通過與當地的人文學者、申遺專家等進行交流，揭秘中國世界遺產背後的故事，呈現中國世界文化遺產的新奇觀、新地標、新景象、新人文。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E2 - 劇組重聚回看舊照淚目
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E2 - 劇組重聚回看舊照淚目
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。
